Job Description:
We are hiring a Camera/Vision Engineer to build high-performance embedded vision systems across a range of products. This role spans camera bring-up, video pipeline development, and AI-based analytics on embedded platforms such as NXP i.MX8M Plus and NVIDIA Jetson Xavier NX. Depending on experience, the candidate will either contribute as a strong individual contributor or take ownership of system architecture, performance optimization, and technical direction.

Key Responsibilities:
- Design, develop, and optimize camera and video pipelines on Embedded Linux systems.
- Work extensively with GStreamer, V4L2, ISP pipelines, and hardware codecs (H.264/H.265).
- Bring up camera sensors (MIPI-CSI), debug end-to-end pipelines (sensor -> ISP -> application).
- Develop AI-driven video analytics using OpenCV, YOLO, TensorFlow, or similar frameworks.
- Maintain and customize Yocto-based Linux distributions and BSP layers.
- Perform deep debugging across kernel, drivers, and application layers.
- Optimize performance for real-time video workloads on embedded SoCs.
- Collaborate closely with hardware, AI, and product teams for system integration.
(For Senior Candidates:)
- Define system architecture for camera and video subsystems.
- Lead performance tuning, pipeline design decisions, and technology selection.
- Mentor junior engineers and drive best practices in development and debugging.

Eligibility / Requirements:
- B.E. / B.Tech / M.Tech in Electronics, Computer Science, or related field.
- 3-12+ years of experience in embedded camera/video systems.
- Strong experience in Embedded Linux, GStreamer, and multimedia frameworks.
- Solid understanding of camera systems, ISP concepts, and video pipelines.
- Proficiency in C/C++ (Python is a plus).
- Experience with Yocto, BSP customization, and cross-compilation.
- Strong debugging and problem-solving skills at system level.

Good to Have:
- Experience on platforms like NVIDIA Jetson Orin, NXP i.MX8M, or similar ARM SoCs.
- Exposure to AI/ML deployment on edge devices.
- Experience in drone, robotics, surveillance, or industrial vision systems.
- Familiarity with streaming protocols (HLS/RTSP/WebRTC).

Why Join Us:
- Work on cutting-edge embedded vision and AI systems.
- High ownership and fast-paced product development environment.
- Opportunity to influence architecture and core technology decisions.

We are looking for a Senior Full-Stack Developer who can independently design, build, and evolve application features across frontend and backend systems. In this role, you will take end-to-end ownership of complex features, make sound technical decisions, and help improve overall code quality and engineering practices in a team environment.

Key Responsibilities:
Frontend Development:
- Design and develop scalable, user-friendly interfaces.
- Implement complex user flows, interactions, and validations.
- Improve frontend performance and maintainability.

Review and improve frontend code written by others.
Backend Development:
- Design and implement robust APIs and backend services.
- Handle complex business logic and workflows.
- Design efficient and scalable data models.
- Ensure security, reliability, and performance of backend systems.

Technical Ownership & Leadership:
- Own features from concept to deployment.
- Make architectural and design trade-offs pragmatically.
- Review code and mentor junior developers.
- Identify and address technical debt.
- Participate in technical planning and decision-making.

Quality & Reliability:
- Define and uphold coding and testing standards.
- Write and review unit and integration tests.
- Debug complex production issues.
- Improve system stability and performance.

Required Skills / Technical Skills:
- Strong experience with at least one frontend technology (React, Angular, Android, or similar).
- Strong experience building backend services using Java, .NET, Node.js, or similar.
- Deep understanding of REST APIs and HTTP concepts.
- Strong experience with relational databases like SQL.
- Proficiency with Git and collaborative workflows.
- Excellent debugging and problem-solving skills.

Cloud & Systems (Advantage):
- Familiarity with AWS services (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, API Gateway).
- Understanding of deployment environments and basic security concepts.

Working Style:
- Comfortable working with minimal supervision.
- Strong ownership mindset.
- Able to handle ambiguity and make decisions.
- Clear communicator and mentor.

Key Responsibilities:
- Lead the design and development of native Android applications using Kotlin/Java.
- Build offline-first mobile apps with synchronization logic for low-connectivity environments.
- Integrate Android apps with backend APIs, databases, and healthcare standards (HL7/FHIR).
- Optimize apps for performance, security, and accessibility across multiple Android versions and devices.
- Collaborate with backend developers, UI/UX designers, QA, and DevOps to deliver seamless experiences.
- Ensure compliance with data privacy and security regulations (HIPAA, NDHM, NABL).
- Mentor junior Android developers and contribute to coding standards.
- Continuously explore new tools and technologies to improve development workflows.

Required Skills & Qualifications:
- 5-8 years of hands-on experience in Android development.
- Strong expertise in Kotlin and Java.
- Solid understanding of Android SDK, Jetpack components, MVVM/MVI/MVC architectures.
- Experience with local storage (Room, SQLite), data sync, and caching strategies.
- Proven ability to integrate with RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and authentication (OAuth2, JWT).
- Experience with push notifications, background services, and device hardware integration (camera, GPS, biometrics).
- Familiarity with secure coding practices and compliance in healthcare/fintech is a plus.
- Knowledge of CI/CD pipelines, Git, Docker (basic DevOps exposure preferred).
- Strong problem-solving, debugging, and performance tuning skills.

Nice to Have (Good Bonus):
- Exposure to cross-platform frameworks (Flutter, React Native).
- Experience in healthcare IT (LIS, HIS, EMR, telehealth apps).
- Contributions to open-source projects or published apps on Google Play Store.

What We Offer:
- Competitive salary with performance bonuses.
- Opportunity to work on impact-driven healthcare solutions used at scale.
- Collaborative startup culture with high ownership.
- Access to cutting-edge technologies and global healthcare projects.
- Growth path towards Tech Lead / Mobile Lead role.
